mentions.note: Solid quarter, terrific guidance, GTA6 confirmed November 19 release de-risks stock; mobile +19% YoY, NBA 2K +30%; stock down 5% unfairly; last great entry before ramp.
Great time to upgrade position ahead of GTA 6 release; recent dip to under $200 good entry; buy some here, pull trigger on rest if falls below $200.

GTA 6 coming out; CEO Strauss Zelnick has a real winner; probably biggest entertainment property of all time. Stock down 6% on day; erratic trader; don't buy all at once but represents good entry point for patient investors.
